backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Beast Clipping backend, defining data types (VideoClip, UserProfile, OAuth credentials, feedback) and implementing clip management, similarity scoring, engagement calculation, and user/admin functionality with HTTP outcalls and access control mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three OAuth/YouTube connection bug-fix features to their relevant frontend files, components, and test IDs, all with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one- to two-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's React components, hooks, and configuration files.
frontend/.env: Frontend environment file containing the Vite-exposed Google OAuth client ID for the Beast Clipping application.
frontend/.env.example: Template environment file with a placeholder for the Google OAuth client ID and a detailed step-by-step guide for creating Google Cloud credentials and configuring redirect URIs.
frontend/.gitignore: Standard Vite/Node gitignore that excludes node_modules, build output, editor files, and environment variable files from version control.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the full design token system in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Beast Clipping Vite app, mounting the React root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application file that sets up TanStack Router and React Query, defines the RootLayout with persistent feedback modal state, and composes the HomePage with video URL input, YouTube player, clip controls, suggestions, and channel connection components.
Displays a debug panel for admin authentication, showing current principal, admin status, and backend initialization info with copy-to-clipboard and refresh functionality.
frontend/src/components/AdminErrorBounda: React class-based error boundary that catches errors in the admin panel and renders a fallback UI with error details, stack trace, and retry/home navigation options.
frontend/src/components/AdminList.tsx: Fetches and displays a list of admin principals using the useAdminList hook, showing each admin's short ID and full principal with loading and error states.
Provides a form to add a new admin by principal ID using the useAddAdmin hook, and renders the AdminList component below it.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Main admin dashboard that composes AdminDebugPanel, AdminManagement, UserStatusManagement, and FeedbackSubmissions into collapsible sections alongside platform statistics.
frontend/src/components/ChannelConnectio: Renders a card for connecting or disconnecting a Google/YouTube account, showing channel info when connected and a connect button when not, using the useYouTubeChannel hook.
frontend/src/components/ClipCard.tsx: Renders a single video clip card with thumbnail, duration, viral score badge, and action buttons for deleting, downloading, and posting to YouTube, with confirmation dialogs and connection state checks.
frontend/src/components/ClipList.tsx: Displays a scrollable list of saved video clips using ClipCard components, with loading and empty states, fetched via the useClips hook.
Shows either AI-generated clip suggestions or trending clip suggestions with viral scores, allowing users to select a suggestion to populate the clip creation form.
frontend/src/components/ClipTimestampCon: Provides a form for setting start/end timestamps and a title to create and save a video clip, syncing inputs from selected clips or AI suggestions.
frontend/src/components/FeedbackModal.ts: A dialog modal for submitting user feedback as either a feature request or bug report, with title and description fields and validation.
frontend/src/components/FeedbackSubmissi: Displays a list of all feedback submissions with type badges, submitter info, timestamps, and delete functionality, with loading and empty states.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main app layout component with a sticky header that handles Internet Identity authentication (login/logout), displays admin/owner navigation buttons conditionally, and includes debug logging for auth and role state.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Onboarding form component that collects a new user's name and email, then saves them as a combined string to the backend user profile with default role and status.
frontend/src/components/UserIdDisplay.ts: Displays the authenticated user's short generated ID and full principal ID, each with a copy-to-clipboard button.
frontend/src/components/UserRoleBadge.ts: Renders a styled badge with an icon for a given UserRole (owner, admin, user, friend), supporting three size variants.
frontend/src/components/UserStatusManage: Admin panel card that lists all users in a searchable table and allows changing each user's role and account status via dropdowns, using mutation hooks for backend updates.
frontend/src/components/VideoUrlForm.tsx: Form component for entering and validating a YouTube URL, loading the video, and optionally triggering AI clip generation for the loaded video ID.
Displays a color-coded badge with an icon and label representing a clip's viral potential score (high/medium/low) in configurable sizes.
frontend/src/components/YouTubePlayer.ts: Renders a responsive 16:9 YouTube iframe embed for a given video ID inside a Card component.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, initializing access control with an admin token and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddAdmin.ts: Provides a mutation hook to add an admin by user ID via the backend actor, invalidating admin-related queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminDebug.ts: Fetches debug information about the current user's admin status using the backend actor, returning placeholder data for fields not yet implemented in the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminList.ts: Fetches the list of admin principals from the backend using React Query, enabled only when the actor is available.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: Fetches admin statistics including total clip count and trending clip analytics from the backend, returning combined loading and error states.
Provides a mutation hook that calls the backend to auto-generate clip suggestions, falling back to mock AI-generated suggestions if the backend returns none.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipCreation.ts: Provides a mutation hook to save a new video clip to the backend, calculating a viral potential score based on duration and title before submission.
frontend/src/hooks/useClips.ts: Fetches all video clips from the backend and provides a delete mutation, tracking which clip is currently being deleted.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipTimestamps.ts: Manages start and end timestamp state (minutes/seconds) for clip creation, providing validation, formatting, and conversion utilities.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteFeedback.ts: Provides a mutation hook to delete a feedback submission by ID, showing toast notifications on success or error.
frontend/src/hooks/useDownloadClip.ts: Provides a mutation hook that generates a download URL from the backend and triggers a browser file download for a video clip.
frontend/src/hooks/useFeedbackSubmission: Fetches all feedback submissions from the backend using React Query, enabled only when the actor is ready.
frontend/src/hooks/useFeedbackSubmit.ts: Provides a mutation hook to submit user feedback to the backend, invalidating the submissions cache and showing toast notifications on completion.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetOwnRole.ts: Fetches the current authenticated user's role from the backend, returning null on error instead of throwing to handle users without profiles.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsOwner.ts: React Query hook that calls the backend `isCallerAdmin()` to determine if the current authenticated user has admin/owner privileges, with detailed debug logging.
frontend/src/hooks/usePostToYouTube.ts: Mutation hook that posts a video clip to YouTube Shorts via the backend actor, validating OAuth credentials and enforcing a 60-second duration limit.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for user profile CRUD, Google OAuth credential storage/status checks, and YouTube channel connection status.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetUserRole.ts: Mutation hook that calls the backend `setUserRole` to update a user's role by principal, invalidating related queries and showing toast notifications on success or error.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetUserStatus.ts: Mutation hook that calls the backend `updateUserStatus` to change a user's status by principal, invalidating related queries and showing toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrendingClips.ts: Simple React Query hook that fetches trending video clips from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserRoles.ts: React Query hook that fetches all user roles from the backend and enriches each entry with the user's profile and status.
frontend/src/hooks/useYouTubeChannel.ts: Provides queries and mutations for checking YouTube channel connection status, initiating the Google OAuth flow, and disconnecting a channel via the backend actor.
Utility hook exposing functions to validate a YouTube URL format and extract the 11-character video ID from it.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radius, and chart variables.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/OAuthCallback.tsx: React page that handles the Google OAuth callback by waiting for the backend actor to be ready, validating URL params and state, then storing credentials via a mutation. Shows loading, success, or error states and redirects to home after completion.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers for persisting values to/from sessionStorage and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/src/utils/userIdGenerator.ts: Exports a single function that deterministically generates an 8-character base-36 user ID from a principal string using a simple hash algorithm.
frontend/src/utils/youtubeOAuthDebug.ts: Debugging utility class for the YouTube OAuth flow that logs timestamped entries for OAuth initiation, callbacks, token validation, backend calls, and common error pattern matching.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, fonts, accordion keyframe animations, and enabling the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the Beast Clipping app, its known YouTube OAuth connectivity bug (connected state reverts to disconnected), and three existing fix-request features targeting OAuth callback reliability, actor initialization waiting, and query invalidation after credential save.
